---
title: "Evaluating Personal Job Market Prospects in 2024"
subtitle: "Final Report"
author:
  - "Project Group 2"
  - "Carolina Resendez"
  - "Saori Kikuchi"
date: today
date-modified: today
date-format: long
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  docx: default
---

{{< include introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include data_cleaning.qmd >}}

{{< include eda.qmd >}}

{{< include ml_methods.qmd >}}

{{< include nlp_methods.qmd >}}

{{< include skill_gap_analysis.qmd >}}

{{< include discussion.qmd >}}

{{< include conclusion.qmd >}}
